epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Thanks Julia. I’ve collected it this morning. 😀

ℹ️ We make the trip to West London tonight to face Chelsea at Stamford Bridge.

Kick-off is set for 8.15pm, with gates opening at 6.45pm.

F

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).
Documents for lawyer documents for accountant
redesign with a more human feel that's gonna affect the video and the deck as well
Lawyers BB send the finalised docs

lead.headline: Critical documents from lawyers remain unsigned and unfinalized.
lead.deck: Multiple tasks reference outstanding legal paperwork and accountant documents that need immediate attention before your founder check-in this afternoon. Without these signed, you're exposed on both legal and financial fronts.
